title: SIDH and SIKE: History and Design
description: Explore the design of SIDH and SIKE, once a promising NIST post-quantum candidate. Understand how it worked before the devastating 2022 attack.
learningObjectives: Explain the SIDH key exchange protocol
Understand why auxiliary torsion points were needed
Analyze the parameter choices and their rationale
Appreciate why SIDH was considered promising before the attack
